SELECT sqidDecode(sqid) AS decoded_sqid FROM test_table WHERE sqid IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE second_table (id UInt64, sqid String);
SELECT id, sqidDecode(sqid) AS decoded FROM second_table;
SELECT id, sqidDecode(sqid) FROM second_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM second_table WHERE id > 0);
SELECT sqidDecode(sqid) FROM test_table WHERE sqid IN (SELECT sqid FROM second_table);
SELECT decode_result.sqid, sqidDecode(decode_result.sqid) FROM (SELECT sqid FROM test_table) AS decode_result;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE sqidDecode(sqid) = [];
SELECT sqidDecode(sqid) FROM test_table WHERE LENGTH(sqid) > 0 AND LENGTH(sqid) < 50;
SELECT DISTINCT sqidDecode(sqid) AS unique_decoded FROM test_table;
SELECT sqid, sqidDecode(sqid) FROM test_table ORDER BY sqid;
WITH decoded_values AS (SELECT sqidDecode(sqid) AS decoded FROM test_table) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decoded_values WHERE decoded != [];
